---
title: "Post title here"
date: 2026-01-01
categories: []
description: "One or two sentence summary shown on the listing card."
engine: markdown
---

```{=html}
<style>#title-block-header { display: none !important; }</style>
<div class="page-header">
  <h1>Post title here</h1>
</div>
<p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin:0.5rem 0 2rem 0;font-weight:500;">1 January 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span style="color:var(--accent);">Category &nbsp;·&nbsp; Category</span></p>
<hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:0 0 2rem 0;">
```

Opening paragraph here.

---

Body here.

---

## References

1. Author A, Author B. Title. *Journal.* Year;vol(issue):pages. [PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/)
